stemHtml: What is correct for aircraft equipment which operates to RNP 1 and better?

options.a: The equipment should be able to compute an estimated value of the aircraft’s position error.
options.b: The equipment should be able to correct for an estimated value of the aircraft’s position error.
options.c: The equipment should be able to compute the exact value of the aircraft’s position error.
options.d: The equipment should be able to correct for the exact value of the aircraft’s position error.
